# Fonts (slim variant)

Font binaries are not bundled in the slim skill (they're ~14 MB and free on Google Fonts).

- **Poppins** — https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Poppins
- **Inter**   — https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Inter

Install them on your machine, or use the web `<link>` from `references/typography.md` for browser-based work. The full skill repo includes the .ttf/.otf binaries if you need them for offline / print work.
